name: Photogrammetric Survey Mission Planning
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist contracted to conduct precision agriculture mapping of a wheat field near Zurich. Create a QGroundControl survey mission plan that meets the camera specifications, image quality metrics, and flight parameters detailed in the requirements document on the workstation. The mission must satisfy the contracted GSD and overlap requirements. Save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/field_survey.plan.
